race.description: Copy Bets With Tabtouch Bet Loop 3Yo C&G (L)
race.comment: IDEAL BEACH (12) comes off a midfield finish last week but that was his first outing for more than six months and he is two from two when second up so is sure to be better for it. He was one of the leading juveniles of last season, highlighted by his Group 1 Westbred Classic win and his strike rate at this circuit and distance stands at 50 per cent. The one to beat. WHEELSOFORTUNE (9) draws wide but had enough speed to cross and lead before digging deep to score at this circuit and distance last time, adding to his consistent form. Go well again. WAKE UP GEOFF (1) will be fitter for his resuming fourth from a wider barrier and is aided by the ace draw. AMALFI KNIGHT (4) won his only previous second-up attempt and has won two of three tries at this circuit and distance so expect improvement.
